## 🎬 Kickoff Checklist

Before epic starts:

- [ ] All stories drafted and linked
- [ ] Dependencies identified
- [ ] Timeline agreed
- [ ] Team composition confirmed
- [ ] Design/architecture finalized
- [ ] Risks documented
- [ ] Success metrics defined

---

## 🏁 Completion Criteria

- [ ] All child stories DONE
- [ ] Integration tested
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Metrics/KPIs met
- [ ] User acceptance verified
- [ ] Production deployment successful

---
